race.comment: DEMARCATE (10) relished the sharp weight drop with a dominant victory in a six-horse field over 1200m at Warren. Was a month between runs on that occasion and strips even fitter for this. Leading apprentice takes the ride from the good gate. Will take catching. NOT WRITTEN OFF (3) nailed late with the 58.5kg first-up, then jumped in grade with a handy fifth over 1100m at Scone in BM82 class. Will find this more to her liking and has excellent figures over this course and distance. CRESTA RUN (5) good fresh mare resuming with the claim. Jumped sharply in grade from the wide gate with a battling last over 1280m at Muswellbrook in the H&NW Champs on March 8. Maps well and has a good record at this track. SPECK (1) consistent mare resuming in an easier contest. Went out quickly and gripped on late when second over 900m at Muswellbrook last November. Will relish the 3kg claim and must be kept safe.
